title: Unicorn Eclipse Ultra 2.0 Professional Dartboard | Venom Black Razor Spider | Hi-Vis Horizontal Numbers | Abyss Intense Vibrant Colour Longevity | Rotatable Symmetric Logos
features: ULTIMATE CHAMPIONSHIP ‘ABYSS’ PLAYING SURFACE – Groundbreaking premium playing surface engineered for optimal performance during intense, professional-standard gameplay; its self-healing sisal, infused with ‘Abyss Printing’ tech, delivers unparalleled depth of colour and long-lasting appeal

BLACK VENOM ANTI-GLARE SPIDER TECHNOLOGY – Redesigned radial razor spider introduces a state-of-the-art ‘Black Venom’ coating to reduce glare, minimise distractions and provide sharper segment definition to enhance focus and scoring precision

ULTRA-VIS HORIZONTAL NUMBER RING - Innovative horizontal rotation of the dartboard’s side numbers ensures effortless player decision-making; camouflaged black metal number ring intensifies number brightness, reducing eye strain for elite competitive precision

PROFESSIONAL AND MODERN VISUAL APPEAL – Revamped design positions stunning orange and gunmetal grey graphics symmetrically around the dartboard, ensuring each rotation maintains its sleek look during competition gameplay for reduced distractions

INNOVATIVE UNILOCK WALL MOUNTING DEVICE – Equipped with 3x easy-to-install advanced locking devices designed to eliminate wobbling on all types of uneven wall surfaces for a stable and enjoyable playing experience
